---
title: "土壤有机质分子特征与细菌丰富度可复现分析"
author: "D2RS小组"
date: "2026"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE, 
  fig.width = 7, 
  fig.height = 4,
  fig.path = "../outputs/figs/"
)

library(tidyverse)
library(ggpubr)
library(corrplot)
